ValidationRule.description: Modified for Serbia also during CC Release Jan 2012
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Category__c,'Relief'), ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Detail__c ,'Relief vehicle request'), OR( $RecordType.Id = '01220000000MDhj', $RecordType.Id = '01220000000MFwy'), OR(ISNULL( Service_Request_Date__c),ISNULL( Number_of_days__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Following fields "Service request date" and "Number of days" must be filled in
